institution.name: Demo University
institution.description: WebMCP prototype demonstrating structured AI agent access for university websites

tools.name: searchPrograms
tools.description: Search the program catalog by keyword, degree level, and modality

tools.description: Get full details for a specific program including description, requirements, outcomes, and cost

tools.description: Get the step-by-step admissions process for a given program level and student type

tools.name: submitRFI
tools.description: Submit a Request for Information on behalf of a prospective student

consent.scope: Submitting personal contact information to the university admissions office

tools.name: getFinancialAidEstimate
tools.description: Get estimated tuition, financial aid ranges, and available scholarships for a program
